title: narcissus × curtisii
intro: Narcissus × curtisii, also known as the miniature jonquil or miniature daffodil, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and have antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Narcissus × curtisii include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve mood, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to aid in relaxation and promote overall well-being.
